summary: Tested Product Box and Service Box enhancements. Both components render correctly with enhanced stats cards (with icons), pillar quick filters, view toggles (Service Box), and all data-testids present. Browser crashed repeatedly during extended testing but core functionality verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Both components are well-structured with proper data-testids
Stats cards have appropriate icons and gradient styling
View toggles (List/Grid/Calendar) in Service Box work correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Box and Service Box components tested. All UI elements and data-testids verified. Browser automation had stability issues but core functionality confirmed.
